hooks.command:
jq -r '.prompt' | { read -r prompt; case "$prompt" in '<task-notification>'*) exit 0;; esac; timestamp=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'); printf '
---

**[%s] User:**
%s
' "$timestamp" "$prompt" >> "/Users/ramonnaula/Desktop/Classroom_Bot/Tony_the_Bot/Log/prompt_log.md"; } 2>/dev/null || true
